title: adhatoda martiana
intro: Adhatoda martiana, also known as Vasaka, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda martiana include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit antioxidant properties. Adhatoda martiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
